title: JP-PRO Engineering Deliverables Automation
description: A configurable C#/.NET Autodesk Vault Job Processor extension that reacts to lifecycle transitions and generates controlled engineering outputs including PDF, STEP, IGES, DXF, sheet-metal and synchronised document formats.
highlights: XML-driven routing, exporter settings and filename rules
Attachment, overwrite, logging and notification controls

title: AI Mentions Tracker
description: A full-stack AI-search visibility platform that runs grounded Gemini audits, uses structured model judging to classify brand mentions and citations, stores results in PostgreSQL and produces daily analytical rollups.
highlights: Grounded LLM calls and second-pass structured judging
Worker, Docker and Google Cloud deployment architecture

title: Price Hunter Pro
description: An Australian retail meta-search prototype that queries multiple providers in parallel, converts source-specific responses into a common product schema, removes basic duplicates and presents price and risk comparisons.
highlights: eBay OAuth, SerpAPI and Puppeteer provider adapters
Firestore caching and grey-market risk labelling

title: AI Visibility Website Platform
description: A family of responsive React service experiences for SkyScale, covering the company website, AEO/GEO positioning, audit packaging, client evidence, pricing, FAQs, structured metadata and conversion journeys.
highlights: Technical SEO, canonical metadata and JSON-LD
Reusable proof, pricing, review and CTA components

title: Legal Services Conversion Website
description: A criminal-defence website prototype designed around urgent mobile contact, reassurance, fee transparency, authority signals, service qualification and repeated consultation actions.
highlights: Responsive click-to-call and sticky mobile actions
Reusable services, process, profile, review and FAQ sections

title: HTML-to-PDF Reporting Utility
description: A Node.js browser-automation tool that loads local or hosted HTML, waits for network and font completion, applies print-specific layout rules and exports each report section as a correctly paginated PDF page.
highlights: Page-specific print CSS with reliable backgrounds and breaks
